subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enthralled by the Beauty of the All-Glorious! The brief line which thou hadst written in the margin of thy father's letter was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون جمال ابهی در حاشیه نامه پدر سطر مختصر مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
